info.name: Paneer Biryani, Gujiya & Thandai Combo
info.description: Paneer biryani served with traditional gujiya and cooling thandai. A colourful sweet-and-savoury Holi special.

info.name: Chicken Biryani, Gujiya & Thandai Combo
info.description: Aromatic chicken biryani alongside gujiya and thandai... bringing warmth, sweetness and cool relief to your Holi feast.

info.name: Rajma Rice Bowl, Gujiya & Thandai Holi Special Combo
info.description: A classic comfort meal with a festive twist! Relish slow-cooked Rajma in a rich, homestyle gravy, served with refreshing Thandai and flaky Gujiya... Because no Holi is complete without it. (Energy: 1036KCal, Carbohydrates: 125gm, Proteins: 20gm, Fats: 45gm, Sodium: 1311mg)

info.name: Chole Rice Bowl, Gujiya & Thandai Holi Special Combo

info.name: Dal Makhani Rice Bowl, Gujiya & Thandai Holi Special Combo

info.name: Butter Chicken Rice Bowl, Gujiya & Thandai Holi Special Combo
info.description: A festive treat like no other! Savor the creamy, flavorful Butter Chicken with a side of Thandai for a refreshing sip and end on a sweet note with a traditional Gujiya. Holi celebrations just got tastier! (Energy: 1111KCal, Carbohydrates: 103gm, Proteins: 39gm, Fats: 55gm, Sodium: 240mg)
